findings.evidence: `rg -n "trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast|trace_eq_zero_of_sq_algebraMap|sq_ratCast" code mathlib` shows `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:32` private `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_algebraMap_of_not_mem_range` with the same hypotheses/conclusion, and `code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean:65` public `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range`; the new duplicate declarations are at `TraceForm.lean:55` and `TraceForm.lean:111`.
findings.fix: Move/expose the existing general lemma from `TauCeti.FieldTheory.Trace`, import it here, and make the roadmap spelling a thin wrapper or alias around the existing public number-field theorem rather than reproving the same criterion.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_mem_range` repeats the existing square-root trace-zero lemma already in `TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean`, and line 111 adds a parallel number-field API to the existing public `TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range`.

summary: The PR duplicates an existing TauCeti square-root trace-zero API instead of reusing or exposing it from the shared trace file.
